IIT Kharagpur Courses & Fees 2026

Sarthak Das

Updated on - Jun 16, 2026

IIT Kharagpur Latest Updates and News

15 Feb, 2026 IIT Kharagpur PG Diploma in Management Business Analytics Fee structure 2026-27 has been released. The total academic fee is ₹ 27.1 Lakhs.

IIT Kharagpur offers 229 courses in various streams like Engineering, Architecture, Law, and Science. The top courses of IIT Kharagpu are M.Tech, B.Tech, Ph.D, and M.Sc. It offers the M.Tech program as its most popular program.

IIT Kharagpur Course and Fees Quick Overview

  • Top specialisations offered in these courses include M.Tech(Computer Science and Data Processing), B.Tech(Mechanical Engineering), PhD (Science), and M.Sc(Physics).
  • M.Tech Fee at IIT Kharagpur is around INR 2.13 Lakhs for the full 2-year duration.
  • B.Tech Fee at IIT Kharagpur is around INR 11.81 Lakhs in total.
  • PhD Fees at IIT Kharagpur is around INR 1.5 Lakhs in total.
Table of Contents
  1. IIT Kharagpur M.Tech Fees 2026
  2. IIT Kharagpur B.Tech Fees 2026
  3. IIT Kharagpur Fees for Other Courses 2026
  4. IIT Kharagpur Application Fees
  5. IIT Kharagpur Scholarship & Financial Aid
  6. IIT Kharagpur Course & Fees FAQs

IIT Kharagpur M.Tech Fees 2026

M.Tech at IIT Kharagpur is the most popular 2-year PG program offered in 66 specialisations. The Fee for the M.Tech program is INR 2.13 Lakhs. The course eligibility required for admission in M.Tech is a graduation + GATE.

M.Tech Popular Specialisations:

  • Computer Science And Data Processing
  • Computer Science And Engineering
  • Microelectronics and VLSI Design
  • Food Process Engineering
  • Signal Processing & Machine Learning

IIT Kharagpur B.Tech Fees 2026

B.Tech at IIT Kharagpur is a 4-year UG program offered in 19 specialisations. The course eligibility required for admission in B.Tech is 10+2 with 75% + JEE Advanced.

Specializations Total Fees
B.Tech Mechanical Engineering

INR 11.81 Lakhs
B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech Aerospace Engineering
B.Tech Agricultural And Food Engineering
B.Tech Chemical Engineering

IIT Kharagpur Fees for Other Courses 2026

IIT Kharagpur fees for other courses are mentioned below.

Course Fees (INR)
M.Sc INR 10,000 - 82,600
BS INR 11.81 Lakhs - 14.73 Lakhs
B.Arch INR 14.73 Lakhs
L.L.M INR 5.95 Lakhs
MBA INR 5 Lakhs - 27.1 Lakhs
Certification INR 80,000
MBA INR 13.04 Lakhs

IIT Kharagpur Application Fees

Students willing to take admission in IIT Kharagpur are required to pay an application fee at the time of admission to book their seat in that course. The details of application fees for some of the top courses are as follows -

  • M.Tech: INR 500
  • Ph.D: INR 1,000
  • L.L.M: INR 4,000
  • MBA: INR 800 - 2,500
  • EMBA: INR 1,000

Note: Please note that the application fees mentioned above are indicative and may change as per the college’s notice. Students are advised to check the official website or visit the campus for updated information.

IIT Kharagpur Scholarship & Financial Aid

IIT Kharagpur offers a variety of scholarships for meritorious students, helping reduce the overall cost of education and making fees more affordable. Students can avail these scholarships to manage their total course fees within a comfortable budget. The university, along with the government, provides multiple financial aid options. Some of the top government scholarships available for students are listed below:

  • NSP (PM-USP) Yojana
  • National Scholarship for Postgraduate Studies (UGC)

For detailed information, check the IIT Kharagpur Scholarship 2026

IIT Kharagpur Course & Fees FAQs

Ques. Are there any hidden or extra costs apart from tuition fees in IIT Kharagpur courses?

Ans. Yes, apart from tuition fees, students need to spend on hostel fees, mess charges, books, and personal expenses. These costs are not very high compared to private colleges, but they still add up over time.

Ques. Do course fees increase during the program duration?

Ans. Usually, the fee structure stays mostly stable during your course, but small changes can happen due to policy updates. These changes are not very frequent, and students are informed in advance. So, while planning finances, it is safe to assume that fees will remain almost the same.

Ques. How do scholarships impact the actual fees students pay at IIT Kharagpur?

Ans. Scholarships make a big difference for many students. Those from lower-income families can get full or partial tuition fee waivers. There are also merit-based scholarships and government schemes. Because of this, some students end up paying very little compared to the official fee structure.

Ques. Is IIT Kharagpur a good option to apply? How are the placements at IIT Kharagpur

Ans. IIT Kharagpur is a great option with good ROI. it offers good placements with average package of INR 24.3 Lakhs.

IIT Kharagpur Bachelor of Architecture [B.Arch]: Students' Opinion

  • Bachelor of Architecture [B.Arch]

AI-Generated Summary based on 15 Reviews

Fees at IIT Kharagpur for the Bachelor of Architecture [B.Arch] program are structured per semester. Tuition fees for general category students are set at Rs. 100,000 per semester. Additional expenses include hostel fees, approximately Rs. 8,500, and variable mess fees, generally around Rs. 32,000, leading to a total semester cost of about Rs. 150,000. For students from reserved categories such as SC, ST, and OBC, tuition fees are waived entirely.

Furthermore, for families with an annual income below Rs. 1 lakh, tuition fees are also waived, and those with incomes below Rs. 5 lakh may receive a 33% tuition fee concession. IIT Kharagpur offers various scholarships, such as the Merit Cum Means Scholarship, potentially reducing costs further. Refundable deposits and potential extra charges depend on specific circumstances, and students are encouraged to explore eligibility for financial support on the official IIT Kharagpur website.

All tuition fees are waivered but other fees have to be paid. Max 25% of admitted students in the institute can avail this scholarship.A student can only take one scholarship at a time regardless of the source. To be eligible, the following conditions have to be met: 1)Student has to meet the merit criterion.(60% in Boards and 7.00 CGPA) 2)Parent/Guardian has to meet the means criterion. 3)No disciplinary action taken or pending against him from the preceeding year for renewal. Other scholarships from external sources can also be availed if not eligible for this one.

B.Tech, Industrial Engineering
Reviewed on Aug 6, 2025(Enrolled 2024)

IIT KGP in a sophmores eye

Fees and Financial Aid:

The fee structure for students admitted through JEE Advanced varies by category and family income. For General,EWS,OBC-NCL students with family income above 5 lakh rupees per annum, the tution fe is 1 lakh per semester, along with other compulsory charges like registratiom,examination,internet,gymkhana,laboratory, hostel rent, electrucity/water , hall establishment, hostel overheaf,hall budget, and mess charges. In the 1st year, one time fees such as caution deposits, alumni subscription, etc fees are also paid bringing the total first year cost around 3.77 lakh. From the second year onwards, without one time charges the annual cost is about 2.6 lakh. For UR/EWS/OBC_NCL students with income between 1lakh and 5 lakh, the tution fee is reduced to 33.33k per semester. And for income below 1 lakh the tution fee is zero. Merit cum scholorships are availble which gives tution fee waiver along with 12k per annum for income below 6 lakh

As I have completed my diploma in food technology so how to get admission or what is the process of getting admission in iit karaghpur for btech ?

Vinima Bhola

Applications for IIT Kharagpur's B.Tech programme, which is based on JEE Advanced (after qualifying JEE Main), are only accepted from those who have completed or are studying for their 10+2 (or equivalent) with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) as subjects.

Eligibility for B.Tech Admission

Step

Requirement/Process

Eligibility

10+2 with PCM, JEE Main qualified, JEE Advanced qualified

Diploma Route

Not eligible for B.Tech at IITs unless you also have 10+2 PCM

Entrance Exams

JEE Main ? JEE Advanced

Counselling

JoSAA counselling, seat allotment

Admission

Accept seat, complete formalities at IIT Kharagpur

With only a diploma in food technology (without 10+2 PCM), you are NOT eligible for B.Tech admission at IIT Kharagpur or any other IIT via JEE Advanced.
If you wish to pursue B.Tech at IIT Kharagpur, you must complete 10+2 (or equivalent) with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, qualify for JEE Main, and then JEE Advanced

...Read More
0
0

Does IIT Kharagpur offer MTech programs?

Arjunstudent at IIT KGP

IIT Kharagpur Offers a Joint M.Tech-PhD program. The admission for this course is based on GATE score. After admission into this program, the students with 8 CGPA or above in first year can take a written test and/or interview for enrolment into PhD. Those who do not qualify for PhD can still complete their 2 year M.Tech program at IIT KGP. 

Here is the eligibility criteria for admission into the Joint M.Tech-PhD program at IIT KGP-

  • Candidates need a BE/ BTech degree with a minimum of 60% aggregate (55% for SC/ST/PwD). 
  • Candidates must secure a valid GATE score relevant to their qualifying discipline. In case of absence of a specific GATE paper for their specialisation, XE/XL/XH papers will be considered for selection.
  • Candidates who have completed their B.Tech from an IIT with more than 8 CGPA on a 10 point scale can apply for admission without taking the GATE exam.
  • The admission is also open for sponsored candidates.

You can visit https://www.iitkgp.ac.in/admission-pg to check the various specialisations in which IIT KGP offers an M.Tech.

...Read More

I need to join IIT Kharagpur's mining machinery online course. Kindly help how to join this course.

ArpitStudent at IIT kharagpur

The IIT Mining Machinery Course is ideal for you if you want to gain knowledge of the machines that are necessary for mining, like mine pumps, pumping ranges, fittings fans, etc.

To join this course, the basic eligibility criteria is that you must have enough knowledge of the mechanics of engineering, of solids, and of the fundamentals of electrical engineering. 

Here are the important details for this certification course:

  • You’ll have to take the end-term exam for receiving a Mining Machinery certification. The exam is of 100 marks, and the passing marks are 75. 
  • You’ll have to complete 12 assignments in this course.
  • Out of these 12 assignments, the score of the best 8 will be used for the Mining Machinery certification. 
  • The final score will be calculated by adding the average assignment score to the exam score.
  • You will get the certificate only after attaining good scores in both. 
  • You will be eligible for a certificate only if the average assignment score >=10/25 and exam score >= 30/75. If one of the 2 criteria is not met, you will not get the certificate even if the final score >= 40/100.
  • The certificate will have your name, photograph and the score in the final exam with the breakup. It will have the logos of NPTEL and IIT Kharagpur. It will be e-verifiable at nptel.ac.in/noc.

To apply for this course, you must visit https://nptel.ac.in/courses

As of now, the registration is closed for this programme. You can apply once the enrollment opens.

...Read More
0
0

Does iit Kharagpur offer B.Arch?

RituB.Arch student at IIT KGP

Yes, IIT Kharagpur does offer a B.Arch degree.

Here is the eligibility criteria for admission into this program at IIT KGP-

  • The candidates must have had PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Maths) as major subjects in class 12th.
  • The candidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognised board with a minimum of 75%. For SC/ST candidates, the minimum required percentage in 10+2 is 65%.
  • Final selection is based on the JEE Advanced Architecture Aptitude Test (AAT) + JoSAA Counselling.

These are the eligibility requirements for B.Arch admissions at IIT Kharagpur.

How is IIT Kharagpur executive MBA program?

VishalMBA (2023), IIT Kharagpur

The executive MBA program offered by IIT Kharagpur is one of the best in the market. It is specially designed for senior and mid-career executives who want to progress in their careers, while also working full-time. It is a 3-year program, and for the first 2 years, regular classes are held on weekends. In the 3rd year, hands-on projects are offered for 3 terms. The best part about this program is working full-time as well as doing better at your workplace by applying classroom concepts.

What is the value of IIT Kharagpur online courses?

Vivek NarayanStudies at IIT Kharagpur

IIT Kharagpur offers online courses through the Swayam NPTEL portal. These courses aim to provide education to learners across the country and beyond. The online courses cover various subjects at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Besides video lectures, students are provided with reading materials and assessments to check their progress. 

Expert faculty members design online courses covering disciplines like engineering, computer science, management and more. Upon course completion, students are also provided with a highly regarded certificate.

IIT Kharagpur’s online courses foster continuous learning and development in various disciplines in the educational landscape.

0
0

What is the scope of a 5-year integrated Economics course from IIT Kharagpur?

Atul SharmaWorks at Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur (IIT KGP)

The integrated economics Course from IIT Kharagpur has a wide scope. This course comes under the umbrella of the humanities and social science department. Some of the many prospects offered by this course are 

  1. Higher studies: A student who is inclined towards higher studies can opt for Masters in Economics from any prestigious college in India and abroad and can even get a PhD degree provided that he has sufficient knowledge of economics, a stable GPA and some excellent publications.
  2. Government jobs: The scope of the score spreads to the government sector as well with jobs like RBI, Indian economic service or civil services that help you serve your country. The best part about these jobs is that you can also apply for study leave and pursue higher studies on official holidays.
  3. Software developer: Unlike the general misconception that only CS, E,C, EE students can become software developers, this course too can help you become one. While it is true that the top companies like Google and Microsoft won’t let you sit for placements, you can become a software developer for average banks. Later, you can target technical giants that don’t judge employees on the basis of the branch.
  4. MBA: This is a very common combination. Many economic students target IIMs or other business schools to pursue MBA. Moreover, with a non-engineering background, you can always have an upper hand in B-school admissions.
  5. Data Analyst/Scientist: This is the most common job profile of IIT Kharagpur students who have done an economics majors. Moreover, with the increased demand for AI and machine learning, this has become one of the most appealing fields today.
  6. Finance: The integrated economy course at IIT Kharagpur has many subjects related to finance and mathematics. This makes the student suitable for finance roles and you are likely to become a quantitative analyst.
  7. Consulting/operations: Consulting and Operation roles are available to random students, irrespective of their branch.

The best part about the economics degree is that you have a lot of free time at your hand and can explore other fields, unlike engineering students who are always busy with their coursework. Moreover, if you’re not sure about any particular branch, then Economics can definitely be a good choice.

...Read More
0
0

What are the best branches at IIT Kharagpur?

Soumitra BoseDual Degree Computer Science and Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur (2025)

Generally speaking, the best branches at IIT Kharagpur are considered to be CSE and ME. The choice of a branch depends on many factors and is mostly a matter of personal preference rather than the demand of the branch. Irrespective of the branch you join, IIT provides the following to any IIT student

  • Infrastructure 
  • Academic environment
  • Course-structure
  • Choice of subjects 
  • Geniuses in the form of peers

All these things that groom are given to an IITian irrespective of his branch and makes him worthy either of employment to any industry or a good candidate for higher studies in top foreign universities. This is mainly because of the IIT tag. 

There are many instances where students from Agricultural & Food Engineering (the least demanded branch) were able to get admission to Robotics’ at the Robotics Institute at Carnegie Mellon University (CMU), or the MS program of the University of Rochester, New York to study Computational Linguistics.

Ultimately it’s not your branch that determines your worth but 

  • Your academic performance 
  • Knowledge and skills gained through productive activities done by faculty and peers 
  • Communication skills developed during your time at IIT.

These are much more important and come before your branch preference.

...Read More
0
0

How are the placements, internships and job opportunities for the ocean engineering & naval architecture dual degree course in IIT Kharagpur?

Deepesh SinhaDual Degree(Btech+Mtech) in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur

Placements largely depend on the academic performance of the student, interview, aptitude test, and other non-academic accomplishments. Therefore placements for Ocean Engineering and Naval Architecture cannot be objectively described. 

According to the recent placement reports at IIT Kharagpur, the highest package offered was 48 LPA and the median package was 15.5 LPA. 

The top recruiting companies were Soft Shipyard, Vedam, and GRSE. 100% of students got internships in companies like Microsoft, Adobe, and Upskill. The top roles offered are Marine Engineer, Design Engineer, Navy Personnel, and Ship Manager.

Some companies offer internships opportunities for students belonging to the department of ONA(Ocean engineering and naval architecture) 

ABG Shipyard Limited HSBC Electronic Data Processing India Pvt. Ltd.

American Reprographics Impetus Infotech (India) Pvt. Ltd.

BABAJOB SERVICES PVT LTD Indian Register of Shipping

Beehyv Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Larsen & Toubro Limited

Capillary Technologies Mazagon Dock Limited

Bharati Shipyard Ltd. MAGMA FINCORP LTD

Cybermarine Knowledge Systems Pvt. Ltd. Pipavav Defence and Offshore Engineering

Bankbazaar Infotech Enterprise Ltd, Hyderabad

Capital One Financial Services (India) Ministry of Defence (Navy)

These companies additionally provide PPOs to some of the interns who performed well during their internship but honestly the PPO Percentage in the ONA department is just average.
